message.thinking:

We need to evaluate the provided text. Let's analyze.

So does the text list main sections of thesis? It lists only Problem statement, Topic relevance, and development plan. Not main sections like Introduction, Literature review, Methodology, Results, Discussion, Conclusion. So answer: No, not listing main sections. Feedback: lacks listing of chapters. Complies false.

Description: Does it briefly describe contents of each section? It describes problem statement content, but not other sections. So partially but not all. But question: "Does the text briefly describe contents of each section." Since only one section described. So no. Feedback: Not all sections described. Complies false.

Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It only shows some parts but not full structure. So no. Feedback: structure unclear. Complies false.

Thus produce array.
